Esoterica.Name: Magic_LingStoneMake_1
Esoterica.DisplayName: The Art of Refining Spirit Stones
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508] Acquired supernatural powers: refining spiritual stones\ncondenses the spiritual energy into spiritual stones. [/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Magic_LingCrystalMake_1
Esoterica.DisplayName: The Art of Refining Spirit Crystals
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508] Acquired supernatural powers: refining spiritual crystals\ncondenses Qu into spiritual crystals. [/color][/size]

Esoterica.Name: Magic_MakePuppet
Esoterica.EffectDesc: [size=10][color=#D06508]Learn Miracle: Soul Mastery\nUse on a dead body to awaken it. The awakened body can undertake simple physical labor, with quality related to its cultivational state while it was alive.[/color][/size]
